title: It's not just oil: Aluminum prices have surged as Iran conflict chokes supply
summary_full: The U.S. and Israel's war with Iran has upended the supply of aluminum in the Middle East, sending prices of the base metal skyrocketing.
summary_public: The U.S. and Israel's war with Iran has upended the supply of aluminum in the Middle East, sending prices of the base metal skyrocketing.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel's war with Iran has upended the supply of aluminum
